raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California has expanded full-scope Medi-Cal to all income-eligible adults 50 years of age and older, regardless of immigration status.",
    "California is the first state in the nation to provide full-scope Medi-Cal coverage to undocumented seniors and elders aged 50 and older.",
    "The number of new eligible recipients for Medi-Cal under this expansion is more than 185,000 people.",
    "The COVID-19 pandemic highlighted inequities in the health care system that adversely impacted poor and underserved populations.",
    "The proposed 2022-23 budget includes an expansion of full-scope Medi-Cal coverage to income-eligible adults ages 26 through 49, regardless of immigration status.",
    "There have been successful efforts over the past six years to gain Medi-Cal coverage for children and young adults up to age 26."
  ]
}
```
